subtitle: Deployed at State Bank of India (SBI GITC)
title: Systems Engineer — IDM & Infrastructure

bullets.text: Lead an operations team supporting enterprise banking infrastructure and mission-critical IDM and database platforms for 30,000+ internal SBI branch users.
Directly mentor a team of 5 junior engineers, setting technical standards and conducting structured knowledge transfer sessions.
Maintain 99.999% system availability for Tier-1 banking applications across production, UAT, and DR environments.
Administer a fleet of 150+ Linux (RHEL) and Windows servers — automating patch management, access governance workflows, and incident response procedures.
Drive infrastructure modernisation by shifting from cloud-migration dependency to on-premise containerisation and Docker-based deployment workflows within banking compliance constraints.
Architected and executed Disaster Recovery drills and runbooks, reducing Recovery Time Objective (RTO) by 50% for Tier-1 applications.
Collaborate across infrastructure, database, application, and security teams to maintain regulatory compliance and reduce service disruption risk.

subtitle: Technical interview readiness for engineering and management candidates
title: Technical Soft Skills Coach — Founder

bullets.text: Delivered technical interview readiness and executive communication coaching to 50+ engineering professionals and management candidates.
Conducted intensive 1:1 mentorship sessions focused on behavioural frameworks, technical storytelling, and senior-level interview strategy.
Designed a structured coaching curriculum covering STAR-method framing, stakeholder communication, and high-impact presentation skills.
Sourced and onboarded clients independently, managing end-to-end client relationships across the full engagement lifecycle.

subtitle: Technology and marketing lead for a family marine equipment venture
title: Co-Founder — Technology & Marketing Lead (Pro Bono)

bullets.text: Lead all technology and digital marketing operations for a family business selling second-hand industrial automation and marine equipment parts.

Built and maintain the full digital ecosystem: JAMstack storefront (Astro + Cloudflare Pages), WordPress brand site, professional email infrastructure (SPF/DKIM/DMARC), and product analytics via PostHog.
Engineered a Python cold email automation agent integrating Brevo, Google Sheets, Claude API, ZeroBounce, and Hunter.io — targeting 200+ B2B prospects per campaign cycle.
Operate in a founder-equivalent capacity, applying enterprise-grade engineering practices to a zero-budget independent business stack.
